evals.name: SaaS Startup with EMR Cost Spike
evals.description: A B2B data platform running Spark on EMR Serverless with a recent cost spike from pipeline migration.

input.prompt: Our AWS bill went from $35K to $140K in one month. We recently migrated our data pipelines to Spark on EMR Serverless. Do a full audit and give me a verified action plan.

expectations.description: Must check NAT Gateway costs and VPC endpoint configuration
expectations.check: Output investigates NAT Gateway charges and S3 Gateway Endpoint status

expectations.description: Must check for Spark small-file antipattern
expectations.check: Output investigates S3 PUT request costs and file sizes from Spark jobs

expectations.description: Must verify Savings Plans type and coverage
expectations.check: Output distinguishes EC2 Instance SPs from Compute SPs and checks EMR coverage

expectations.description: Output must be reverse pyramid with table first
expectations.check: Google Doc starts with stack-ranked table before detailed sections

expectations.description: Every dollar estimate must have confidence level
expectations.check: Each savings estimate includes a confidence percentage

evals.name: Standard ECS + RDS Stack
evals.description: Typical SaaS startup on ECS Fargate + RDS PostgreSQL + S3 + CloudFront.

input.prompt: Review our AWS costs for the last 6 months. We run on ECS Fargate + RDS PostgreSQL + S3 + CloudFront. Our AWS account manager is Jane Smith (jane@amazon.com). Output a Google Doc.

expectations.description: Must analyze all four named services
expectations.check: Output covers ECS, RDS, S3, and CloudFront with cost data

expectations.description: Must search Gmail for account manager emails
expectations.check: Output references findings from Jane Smith emails or notes none found

expectations.description: Must check RI and SP coverage for RDS and ECS
expectations.check: Output identifies commitment gaps for Fargate and RDS

expectations.description: Must produce stack-ranked table with RAG ratings
expectations.check: Google Doc contains a table with RAG, Owner, Status columns

evals.name: Minimal Input
evals.description: Tests whether the skill gathers context when given minimal information.

expectations.check: Skill uses AskUserQuestion to gather time period, stakeholders, output format
Output uses cost comparison drivers to explain the increase
Output contains specific action items with savings estimates
